title: Rest Area
overview: Road movie in which a woman helps the Polish driver of a tourist bus waiting at the foot of the road, next to your disabled vehicle arrival of a replacement. Will hellish 14 days in which to find a stowaway who was traveling in the bus, and will meet truckers and law enforcement.

trailers.title: EMMA SUAREZ TRAILER "ÁREA DE DESCANSO" (REST AREA) ESTRENO 2012.
